interface.shortDescription: Use when you want a heavyweight external CodeRabbit CLI review pass on local changes or a PR-sized branch, usually be...
interface.longDescription: Use when you want a heavyweight external CodeRabbit CLI review pass on local changes or a PR-sized branch, usually before push or on a PR branch rather than inside the Stop-hook loop.
